pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:19, export_result.sh:13, task.json:17 - consistent across all files
verifier.py:72-75 implements this scoring rule: if final_target_count == 0, score += 50
verifier.py:82-85 implements this scoring rule: if final_other_count > 0, score += 30
verifier.py:95-98 implements this scoring rule: if initial_target_count > 0 and final_target_count == 0, score += 20
setup_task.sh:20 defines TARGET_IP - this is from RFC 5737 TEST-NET-3 documentation range, not a real IP
setup_task.sh:40-60 injects exactly 2 visits: one at 14:00 yesterday, one at 10:00 today

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic GDPR erasure task using Matomo. The target visitor ID is 34c4f238a0b92382, injected with 2 visits (one yesterday at 14:00, one today at 10:00). Success requires: deleting all target records (50 pts), preserving other visitor data (30 pts), and confirming deletion occurred during task execution (20 pts). Pass threshold is 80/100 points. All visitor data is synthetically generated via shell scripts with random IDs, not real data.
